_comment: DEATHSTAR sensor stack — ESLint config. Calibrated against gui/src so initial run produces 0 errors. Loaded by scripts/check_sensors.py via a generated flat-config wrapper.

_thresholds.complexity: error at 100 — codebase peak ~97 (VMHostsSection:VMCard, ServiceCards). Set just above peak so the sensor sleeps until refactors land, then tighten progressively to 60→30→10.
_thresholds.max-lines: error at 4000 — OptionsModal.jsx is currently 3553. Tighten as files are split.
_thresholds.max-params: error at 15 — codebase peak ~10. Headroom for one more arg before flagging.
_thresholds.no-unused-vars: warn — 17 existing tech-debt cases; tighten to error after cleanup
